company_type: Real Estate Investment Trust (REIT) - Logistics Real Estate

dependencies: Development activities depend on availability of construction materials and labor
Reliance on third-party contractors for development and construction management
Dependence on local permitting and zoning approvals for development projects
risks: Increases in material costs as a result of labor shortages and supply chain disruptions may make the development of properties more costly than originally budgeted
Supply chain disruptions may impact transportation routes of suppliers or customers
Government or labor restrictions may prevent completion of development or leasing of properties

regulatory_risks: Compliance with Foreign Corrupt Practices Act and UK Bribery Act in international operations
Compliance with Americans with Disabilities Act and state/local fire, life-safety, energy and greenhouse gas emissions requirements
Changes in regulatory and environmental requirements, taxes, tariffs, trade wars and laws within countries of operation
REIT qualification requirements under Internal Revenue Code - must distribute at least 90% of taxable income
Risk of losing REIT status and being subject to corporate income taxes
Environmental remediation costs and liabilities under federal, state and local environmental laws
Currency exchange control regulations and transfer pricing regulations affecting cash transfers between subsidiaries
Compliance with multiple and potentially conflicting laws regarding corrupt practices, human rights, employment and licensing
Foreign ownership restrictions in certain countries
Changes in income tax laws and rates in multiple jurisdictions
Potential changes to REIT taxation rules
State and local property tax laws
Prohibited transaction rules for REITs (100% penalty tax on certain property sales)

sanction_risks: Changes in regulation or disruptions in supply chain due to geopolitical tensions
Political instability, uncertainty over property rights, territorial disputes, military conflict, war or expansion of hostilities
Impact of regional or country-specific economic instability, including government shutdowns or withdrawals from international trade alliances
